results.name: sindarin
results.description: The Sindarin (singular Sinda) are a branch of elves in Lord of the Rings.

results.name: sin eater
results.description: Enemies from Final Fantasy XIV: Shadowbringers

results.name: single english word name
results.description: Cards named with a single word in English. This may be a compound word.

results.name: single target instant/sorcery
results.description: Instant/sorcery spells that may target only one target. This is materially important for some effects that care about single targets. Not mutually exclusive with [multiple targets](/tags/card/multiple-targets).

results.name: sisay
results.description: Captain Sisay from the Weatherlight Saga, not her extended family. See [sisay (family)](sisay-family).

results.name: sitting
results.description: People sitting down. See also [invisible chair](/tags/artwork/invisible-chair).

results.name: six seven
results.description: A character doing the "six seven" hand thing in the art (two outstretched hands with open palms facing up)

results.name: skemfar
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of elves.

results.name: skip turn
results.description: Someone skips a turn. See also [prevent extra turns](/tags/card/prevent-extra-turns).

results.name: skirk ridge
results.description: A part of the Pardic Mountains of Dominaria.

results.name: skoti
results.description: The current ruling family of gods on Kaldheim.

results.name: skulk
results.description: Creatures with power greater than X's power can't block it.

results.name: skull helmet
results.description: A skull! But worn on top of *your* skull! Genius!

results.name: skysail
results.description: A sanctuary in Ikoria's sky, made of dozens of balloon-driven airships.
